package rulecoverage

func NegativeConstructorReadsEnvDirectly() string {
    ruleID := "constructor_reads_env_directly"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Constructors that call `os.Getenv` instead of receiving normalized config."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
